# FEATURE_ENV_CONFIG.md
# Project-layer file -- fill in for this specific service
# Generated by: aec init
# Last updated: {{INSTALL_DATE}}
#
# This file is read by:
#   - Feature Validation Agent (A16) -- starts test environment
#   - AC Executor Agent (A08) -- test environment base URL
#   - Kafka Skill Agent (A20) -- test Kafka bootstrap server
#   - Data Migration Agent (A12) -- test database for dry-run
#
# Describe how to start the isolated test environment for AC execution.
# This environment must be safe to write test data to and reset.
# NEVER point this at the production environment.
#
# Run: npx aec update   after editing this file.

---

## Test environment base URL

```
TEST_ENV_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080
```

[Or for a deployed test environment:]
```
TEST_ENV_BASE_URL=https://[service-name]-test.[your-domain].com
```

---

## How to start the test environment

```powershell
# Start all services (adjust if your setup differs)
docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d

# Wait for health check to pass
Start-Sleep -Seconds 15
Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8080/health
```

[Or for a pre-deployed environment:]
```
# Environment is always running at TEST_ENV_BASE_URL above.
# No startup required.
```

---

## Health check endpoint

```
GET {{TEST_ENV_BASE_URL}}/health
Expected: 200 OK with {"status": "UP"} or {"status": "ready"}
```

---

## Test user credentials

[Credentials for test user accounts used by AC execution.
 These must be test-only accounts -- never production credentials.
 Store actual values in a .env.test file (not committed to git).]

```
TEST_USER_STANDARD=test-user@example.com / [from .env.test]
TEST_USER_ADMIN=test-admin@example.com / [from .env.test]
TEST_USER_READONLY=test-readonly@example.com / [from .env.test]
```

[Add additional roles as needed for your service's auth model]

---

## Seed data

[How to load the test data fixtures needed for AC execution.]

```powershell
# Apply database seed data
docker exec [db-container] psql -U postgres -d [database] -f /seeds/test-data.sql

# Or via application endpoint
Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST http://localhost:8080/test/seed
```

[Or: "No seed data required -- tests create their own data via the API."]

---

## Mock dependencies

| Dependency | Mock method | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| [External service] | WireMock on port [N] | [What is mocked] |
| [Email service] | Mailhog on port 8025 | Check sent emails at localhost:8025 |

[Or: "No external dependencies mocked -- test environment calls real staging services."]

---

## Kafka test configuration (if applicable)

```
KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS=localhost:9092
KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY=http://localhost:8081
```

[Or: "Not applicable -- service does not use Kafka."]

---

## Teardown

```powershell
# Stop and clean up (removes test data)
docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v
```

---

## Troubleshooting

| Problem | Solution |
|---|---|
| Health check fails | Check docker logs: docker logs [service-container] |
| Database not ready | Wait 30 seconds and retry -- Postgres takes time to initialise |
| Port conflict | Check if ports 8080/5432/9092 are already in use |
